title: University of Bath Pure API DataSet

pureId.description: Pure database ID of the object, prefer using the UUID if it is present on the entity

uuid.description: UUID, this is the primary identity of the entity

modifiedBy.description: Username of the user that performed a modification

modifiedDate.description: Date and time of last modification

portalUrl.description: URL of the content on the Pure Portal

previousUuids.description: UUIDs of other content items which have been merged into this content item (or similar)

items.description: UUIDs of other content items which have been merged into this content item (or similar)

version.description: Used to guard against conflicting updates. For new content this is null, and for existing content the current value. The property should never be modified by a client, except in the rare case where the client wants to perform an update irrespective of if other clients have made updates in the meantime, also known as a "dirty write". A dirty write is performed by not including the property value or setting the property to null

natureTypes.description: Nature of activity types for the project.

identifiers.description: IDs that this object corresponds to in external systems. Such as a Scopus ID. Used by Pure where it is necessary to identify objects to specific external systems

persons.description: DEPRECATED - use contributors instead. The persons that the dataset is associated with

contributors.description: The contributors that the dataset is associated with

totalNumberOfAuthors.description: The total number of authors from author collaborations.

studentTheses.description: A collection of related student theses.

images.description: Image files with a maximum file size of 1MB

DataSetExternalContributorAssociation.description: An external contributor associated with the content.

hidden.description: If this contribution should be hidden, this is set to true, false otherwise. This is used for dataset that have author collaborations. If they do, we hide the individual contributors.

calculatedPoint.description: Used to determine whether or not we may update the point. An end-user has not entered a point manually if the value of the calculated point is the same as point

FullKeywordGroup.description: Keywords of a specific type. A type of keyword can be configured to solely support free keywords (represented as the FreeKeywordsKeywordGroup type), to solely support structured keywords (represented as the ClassificationsKeywordGroup type), or to both support structured keywords supplemented by optional free keywords (this type)
